description_long: This is a modern, rectangular desk with a dark wood finish and a distinctive ergonomic cutout along the front edge, designed to provide comfortable arm placement for the user. The desk features four sturdy legs, with the front two being slightly inset and the rear two positioned at the corners, offering stability and ample legroom underneath. The surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing computers, documents, or other work materials. The desk's design is minimalist, with no visible drawers, shelves, or additional attachments, emphasizing clean lines and functionality. The material appears to be engineered wood or laminate, giving it a sleek, professional appearance. Its overall construction suggests it is intended for indoor use in environments where durability and aesthetics are important.
description: A modern, dark wood desk with an ergonomic front cutout and four sturdy legs, offering a spacious and minimalist work surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ergonomic cutout and the inset front legs, highlighting the user-facing side.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the desk's depth and the solid, flat side panel with one visible leg.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the straight back edge and the full width of the desk, with both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the desk's profile and the matching side panel with a single leg.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the ergonomic cutout along the front edge, intended to face the user for comfortable seating and arm placement. The back is straight and designed to face away from the user.
